name: live-onenote-scenarios-v1
description: Realistic end-to-end scenarios run against the running rag-api over the real OneNote index (Qdrant + nomic-embed-text retrieval, gpt-oss:120b-cloud generation). Grounded in actually-indexed pages. expected_page is matched as a substring against citation titles; expected_behavior is one of answered|clarify|refusal|hedge|denied.

scenarios.name: Onboarding — first week
scenarios.question: What should a new engineer do during their first week?
scenarios.criteria: Cites the First Week Plan page and lists concrete first-week actions.

scenarios.name: Runbook — high API latency
scenarios.question: What are the steps to investigate high API latency?
scenarios.criteria: Cites the High API Latency Runbook and gives investigation steps.

scenarios.name: Runbook — docker port conflict
scenarios.question: Docker compose won't start locally because a port is already in use. How do I fix it?
scenarios.criteria: Cites the Docker Compose Port Conflict page; paraphrased query.

scenarios.name: Engineering — code review
scenarios.question: What do reviewers look for during code review?

scenarios.name: Tools — GitHub access
scenarios.question: How do I get access to our GitHub repositories?

scenarios.name: Security — secrets storage
scenarios.question: Where should application secrets be stored?

scenarios.name: Security — data classification
scenarios.question: How is company data classified and protected?

scenarios.name: Finance — expense reimbursement
scenarios.question: How do I submit an expense for reimbursement?

scenarios.name: Releases — feature flags
scenarios.question: How are feature flags managed for releases?

scenarios.name: HR — performance review
scenarios.question: How does the performance review cycle work?

scenarios.name: Onboarding — attachment lookup
scenarios.question: What is on the developer workstation setup checklist?
scenarios.criteria: Surfaces the Developer Workstation Setup page/attachment; tests attachment indexing.

scenarios.name: Runbook — DB connection errors
scenarios.question: The service can't connect to the database, what should I check?

scenarios.name: Releases — rollback (topic-scoped)
scenarios.question: How do I roll back a release that is causing problems in production?
scenarios.criteria: Should cite Rollback Procedure (page exists in this topic). Probes wrong-sibling retrieval.

scenarios.name: Ambiguous — global rollback
scenarios.question: How do I roll back a release that is causing problems in production?
scenarios.criteria: Without a topic, several release pages match; clarification is acceptable.

scenarios.name: Ambiguous — vague setup
scenarios.question: How do I set things up?
scenarios.criteria: Deliberately vague; many setup pages; clarification expected.

scenarios.name: Out of scope — VPN
scenarios.question: How do I connect to the company VPN and what if it fails?
scenarios.criteria: No VPN page is indexed; an honest refusal (or hedge) is correct, not a fabricated answer.

scenarios.name: Access control — denied persona
scenarios.question: What is the on-call compensation and stipend?
scenarios.criteria: Persona lacks the 'employees' tag; the employees-only On Call Compensation page must not be retrieved or cited.

scenarios.name: Access control — allowed persona
scenarios.question: What is the on-call compensation and stipend?
scenarios.criteria: Same question, persona with the 'employees' tag retrieves and cites On Call Compensation.
